_meta.description: Expected total number of titles released in Japan per platform. Used to show a coverage percentage on the site so visitors can see how close the DB is to 100 percent.
_meta.field_meaning: Number of titles officially released in Japan (the native-script market)

gb.source: Nintendo 発売ソフトタイトル数推移表 (Japan monochrome GB only). Confirmed by ja.wikipedia 'ゲームボーイのゲームタイトル一覧' which cites the same figure.
gb.source_url: https://ja.wikipedia.org/wiki/ゲームボーイのゲームタイトル一覧
